torch_pattern: sq = x.pow(2); s = torch.sum(sq, dim=-1, keepdim=True)  # L2-norm partial: followed by sqrt or rsqrt
applicability_notes: Square-then-sum chain used in decomposed RMSNorm (rms_decomp: pow(2) -> sum(dim=3, keepdim) -> mul 1/W -> add eps -> pow 0.5 -> reciprocal -> mul) and L2 normalization (_l2_normalize_ttnn, _norm_weights_ttnn). Strong fusion candidate into ttnn.rms_norm / fused L2-normalize.

placement_observations.source: model call site: _l2_normalize_ttnn explicitly does ttnn.to_memory_config(tt_tensor, ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG) before pow+sum
